text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You're so obvious when you're feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ayabe?! Oh no, you heard all that?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Sighing all by yourself on the swings... Could you
get any more cliché?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'm taking a break from being a big sister
right now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You are? I guess nothing's impossible.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My little twin sisters got in a big fight because of
me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And apparently they haven't talked for three days
now! I can't even believe it...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
To make things worse, my mom told me not to
text them because they're still sensitive about it!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What happened?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Helios gave me this weird-looking keychain, so I
decided to send it back home.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And they got into a fight over it... It was this
cutesy bobble head of Fujin the wind god.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you just laugh?! I heard that, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That wasn't a laugh. I'm just relieved.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
They probably wanted it because it shares your
name. That just shows how much they like you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! So that's what's this is about?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Your sisters are really proud of you, so what's the
reason for you to feel down?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right! I feel better already!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, look at me coming to you for comfort.
Ayabe, you're like a real big sister.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't be crazy. I'm nowhere near your level.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Treasure your sisters, okay?
